Notice Of Motion For Protective Order To Limit Number Of Disclosed Expert Witnessesq
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS FRANCOIS EKOULE AND ALWAYS THE BEST LIMOUSINE SERVICE (ABLS) Motion For Protective Order To Limit Number Of Disclosed Expert Witnesses is Continued on the court's own motion to April 2, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 25, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Pro Tem Judge: Tom Cohen, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/mjm
